why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:block_destruction must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a ClientboundBlockDestructionPacket-compatible decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from block break animation semantics, entity existence, client world state, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The Rust oracle test play_block_destruction_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer did not compile because Stevenarella had no Packet::PlayBlockDestructionClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound block_destruction surface. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 Play clientbound table maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00 through minecraft:block_changed_ack / 0x04, but not minecraft:block_destruction / 0x05.

play_clientbound_block_destruction.official_fixture: official ClientboundBlockDestructionPacket breaker id, BlockPos, and progress constructor fixture; no initialized Minecraft/game state
play_clientbound_block_destruction.official_body_shape: breaker id encoded as FriendlyByteBuf VarInt, block position encoded with FriendlyByteBuf BlockPos, progress encoded as one unsigned byte

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundBlockDestructionPacket(int, BlockPos, int), ClientboundBlockDestructionPacket.STREAM_CODEC, FriendlyByteBuf.readVarInt/writeVarInt, FriendlyByteBuf.readBlockPos/writeBlockPos, FriendlyByteBuf.readUnsignedByte/writeByte, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(...).codec().encode/decode(...), and ClientGamePacketListener.handleBlockDestruction(ClientboundBlockDestructionPacket).
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound block_destruction dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet ids 0x00 bundle_delimiter through 0x04 block_changed_ack, but not official packet id 0x05 block_destruction.
Current Packet enum has no Play block_destruction packet variant matching the official 26.1.2 breaker id, BlockPos, and progress body fixture.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayBlockDestructionClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
